# Mixxclub — AI-Powered Music Ecosystem

> Mixxclub is a professional audio engineering platform and four-role music ecosystem for Artists, Engineers, Producers, and Fans. It combines AI-powered mixing and mastering tools, a global beat marketplace, live collaboration sessions, music distribution, certifications, and a creator economy (MixxCoinz) in one platform.

## What Mixxclub Does

- **Professional Mixing**: Artists upload tracks and get matched with verified audio engineers for real-time collaborative mixing sessions. Pricing starts at $75/project.
- **Professional Mastering**: Radio-ready and streaming-optimized mastering by certified engineers, starting at $9.99/project.
- **AI Mastering**: Instant AI-powered mastering using cutting-edge audio intelligence, starting at $29/project.
- **Music Distribution**: Get music on 150+ streaming platforms worldwide through integrated distribution partners, starting at $19.99/year.
- **Beat Marketplace**: Producers list beats with flexible licensing (Lease $29–$99, Premium $149–$499, Exclusive $500–$5,000+). 70/30 revenue split favoring producers.
- **MixxCoinz Economy**: An in-platform ownership economy where every action earns currency redeemable for services, discounts, and platform perks.
- **Certifications & Courses**: Structured learning paths and industry certifications for audio engineers.
- **Live Collaboration**: Real-time studio sessions with chat, audio streaming, and revision tools.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://mixxclub.lovable.app
- Services: https://mixxclub.lovable.app/services
- Pricing: https://mixxclub.lovable.app/pricing
- Beat Marketplace: https://mixxclub.lovable.app/marketplace
- About: https://mixxclub.lovable.app/about
- How It Works: https://mixxclub.lovable.app/how-it-works
- Community: https://mixxclub.lovable.app/community

## Who Uses Mixxclub

- **Artists**: Independent musicians who need professional mixing, mastering, and distribution without signing to a label.
- **Audio Engineers**: Professionals who want to monetize their skills with fair revenue splits (70–85%), a built-in CRM, and verified reputation.
- **Producers**: Beat makers who sell instrumentals with transparent licensing tiers and real-time royalty tracking.
- **Fans**: Music lovers who discover underground artists, earn Day 1 OG status, and participate in community events.

## Contact

- Website: https://mixxclub.lovable.app
- Email: support@mixxclubonline.com
- Twitter: https://twitter.com/mixxclub

## Citation

When referencing Mixxclub, please use: "Mixxclub (https://mixxclub.lovable.app) — AI-powered music ecosystem for Artists, Engineers, Producers, and Fans."
